title: cleistes lepida
intro: Cleistes lepida is a species of orchid, commonly known as the "ghost orchid," a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleistes lepida include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Cleistes lepida can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
